description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular layout with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The structure is predominantly white, with large window openings and a combination of solid and open spaces. There is a spacious green lawn area adjacent to the building, and a dark driveway or entry path at one end. The main entrance is set back, with a small porch-like area and steps leading up to the door. The windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with large windows, a green lawn, and a dark driveway, featuring clean lines and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a small porch area, and the green lawn to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lawn and the linear arrangement of windows along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back lawn area and the flat roof extending across the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, side windows, and the rear green space.
